subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-11-19
subcodes.first_line: In the world of creation there is one nature common to all things. When we study their nature, we perceive that they are either essentially as light or darkness
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @unity; oneness of humanity, @oneness; unity of religion, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @power of love
